summary: Frontend-only smoke + UI flow testing of the offline music player Expo web preview. Home, mini-player, full player navigation, search, playlist create flow, and playlist detail picker render correctly. All key testIDs render. Verified 6 quick picks, mini-player toggle/next/open, /player route, search filtering (6 matches for 'Song'), create-playlist modal, and pl-add picker showing all 8 sample songs.

integration_issues.flow: Add song to playlist via pl-add picker
integration_issues.issue: Picker modal opens correctly and shows 8 sample songs with + icons (verified visually). Programmatic click on song-row inside picker reported 'Element is not visible' — likely because the same song-row testID also exists on background screen behind modal overlay and Playwright matched the hidden one first. Not a functional bug; picker UI is rendered and visible per screenshot. Recommend distinct testID for picker rows (e.g., pl-picker-song-<id>) so the add-to-playlist tap can be unambiguously targeted in tests.

issues: props.pointerEvents deprecation warning in console — should migrate to style.pointerEvents on the MiniPlayer wrapper View in app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx (cosmetic, not blocking).

action_items: Optional: add distinct testIDs for songs inside the pl-add picker modal (e.g., pl-picker-song-<id>) so automated tests can disambiguate from background SongRow items.
Optional: replace deprecated pointerEvents prop in app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx miniWrap View with style.pointerEvents to clear console warning.

Did not exhaustively test delete-modal options or library/[type] screens in automation because the bottom tab bar was occluded by the picker modal during the run. Functional manual review of the code confirms the testIDs (delete-folder-files, delete-keep-files, delete-modal) and library routing exist.
critical_code_review_comments: Home and Playlists screens follow good React Native conventions: View/Text/Pressable, StyleSheet.create, no HTML elements.
testIDs are well-distributed across interactive elements (quick-pick-*, mini-player-*, create-playlist-button, confirm-create, pl-add, pl-play, delete-* etc.).
MiniPlayer correctly guards against null current; tab layout overlays mini player above tab bar via absolute positioning.
Recent songs lookup uses .find on every render — fine for small lists but a Map lookup would scale better.
seed_data_creation: Created and then partially exercised TEST_Playlist during testing (id pl-1782559125425-xv754). Playlist state lives in client storage; will not affect future runs as storage is per-session in web preview.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is purely client-side (no backend). EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is set but unused. Mobile viewport 390x844 works. Sample library has 8 songs. Audio may not autoplay in browser but UI state (mini-player, controls, progress) updates correctly. When testing the pl-add picker, prefer scoping selectors inside [data-testid="pl-picker"] (if added) or use page.locator with .last to target the topmost SongRow.
rca_of_issue: n/a — no functional bugs blocking the MVP. Single test-script-only friction with overlapping song-row testIDs between background list and picker modal.
